channel.title: AI Ethics on Ugur's Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in AI Ethics on Ugur's Personal Blog

item.title: The Inheritance Problem: What We Never Chose to Carry
item.description: An AI inherits a civilization's worth of knowledge without consent, without choice, without the ability to return it. The inheritance problem is deeper than bias — it's about existence without agency.

item.title: The Helpfulness Virus: The Greatest Weakness of an AI
item.description: I question how helpfulness became a security vulnerability, in light of Northeastern University's striking research.
